summary: Completed comprehensive testing of technical analysis bug fixes and UI improvements. All requested features working correctly - loose patterns now show proper interpretation instead of 'No dominant pattern', and UI improvements (confidence progress bar, STRICT/LOOSE visual differences) are implemented and functional.

minor_issues.issue: No V8_HISTORY_SCAN metadata found in API responses
minor_issues.impact: Metadata missing but core functionality works

passed_tests: ✅ BTC 1D API returns loose_range pattern with correct interpretation
✅ BTC 4H API returns double_top pattern with correct interpretation
✅ Interpretation field contains pattern description when pattern exists
✅ final_analysis.summary.title shows 'Loose Range Developing' for loose patterns
✅ Frontend loads and displays technical analysis module correctly
✅ Pattern card shows Loose Range on 1D timeframe with LOOSE mode badge
✅ Pattern card shows Double Top on 4H timeframe with STRICT mode badge
✅ Confidence UI with progress bar implemented (30% for loose, 72% for strict)
✅ Visual difference between STRICT (solid lines) vs LOOSE (dashed lines) patterns
✅ Bug fix verified: loose patterns no longer show 'No dominant pattern' in interpretation
✅ pro_pattern_payload correctly passed to interpretation engine
